channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Voici la box idéale pour un foyer qui veut tout sans payer le prix fort
item.description: Fibre jusqu'à 5 Gbit/s, Wi-Fi 7, plus de 300 chaînes TV et téléphonie illimitée pour 29,99 euros par mois la première année. La Freebox Pop coche presque toutes les cases d'un abonnement complet, sans grimper dans les tarifs premium.

item.title: Martian mocha, anyone? This futuristic coffee machine uses NASA data to give you a taste of 3 different brews from the next 100 years
item.description: Using data from NASA and the UK’s Royal Botanical Society, one designer has developed a Mars-flavored coffee.

item.title: Remote surgery goes mainstream — China's Toumai robot wins EU approval after a London doctor operates on a patient 1,500 miles away
item.description: Chinese firm MedBot has achieved EU approval for its teleoperated surgery robot after a successful prostate cancer operation.

item.title: Duer’s Wear-Everywhere Pants Are on Sale This Weekend
item.description: It’s not often you can score discounts from the outdoor-coded Canadian company that makes understated and stylish performance clothing.

item.title: Researchers invent 'new type of pixel' that could create displays that double as cameras — and the internet's first thought is 'what could go wrong?'
item.description: ETH Zurich researchers have found a way to both emit and analyze light from the same surface.

item.title: This long-forgotten signage from Argentina is World Cup design at its best
item.description: The 1978 global soccer tourney held in Argentina used a grid-based design system with perforated steel panels and button typography and pictograms. When designers for the 1978 World Cup in Argentina designed a signage and wayfinding system for the tournament, they needed something that would be easy to read and scale. Their forgotten work was ingenious and economical—and it’s finally getting its due....

item.title: How professional creators avoid content droughts
item.description: Anthpo and Siow Wei share their content idea generation strategies at VidCon 2026.

item.title: The DJI Mini 5 Pro is a beginner-friendly drone for budding content creators — save $500 this weekend
item.description: Find the best DJI drone deal at Amazon. Save $500 on the DJI Mini 5 Pro Fly More Combo at Amazon.

item.title: Does DeleteMe Actually Get Your Info off the Internet? I Tried It
item.description: Everyone is sick of spam calls and creeper sites that show weirdos where you live—but can any service solve it?

item.title: Security News This Week: LastPass Users Had Their Data Stolen—Again
item.description: Plus: Former national security advisor John Bolton pleads guilty in classified-materials case, Microsoft helps take down major infostealer infrastructure, and more.

item.title: Im watching the Austrian GP for free this weekend — how to live stream F1 for free
item.description: How to watch F1 for free. Live stream the Austrian GP in the 2026 F1 season for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: How to watch F1 live streams online for free
item.description: How to watch F1 for free. Live stream the 2026 F1 season for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: GTA 6 : il n’y aura aucun disque dans les boîtes, même après le lancement
item.description: Pas de disque dans la boîte de GTA 6, et selon The Hollywood Reporter, pas davantage dans les mois qui suivent. La rumeur d’une version disque pour décembre prend du plomb dans l’aile.

item.title: Prime Day is over: We found 50+ deals still live on our Apple, Ninja, Lego, Sony, and DJI favorites
item.description: Amazon's summer sale has ended. Shop the best Prime Day deals on Sony headphones, OLED TVs, Sony headphones, and Apple Watches.

item.title: The 37 Best Outdoor Deals From the REI 4th of July Sale
item.description: Whether you need a tent, sleeping pad, rain jacket, or new pack, REI’s Independence Day sale has something for everyone.

item.title: Elon Musk menace de couper Starlink au-dessus de l’Europe : l’histoire d’un bras de fer fou
item.description: En colère après le projet de la Commission européenne de l'écarter des fréquences mobiles par satellite pour favoriser Iris², SpaceX tape du poing sur la table.

item.title: How to watch Barbarians vs Wales: FREE streams, TV channels for rugby union game
item.description: All the ways to watch Barbarians vs Wales live streams – including for FREE – with Welsh icon George North set to represent the Baa-Baas at Twickenham.

item.title: 3 simple tips working parents can use to create more free time
item.description: Full-time employment and modern parenthood both seem to require more hours than you’re allotted in a day. Here’s how to make it work—without shortchanging your boss or your toddler. Working while parenting can feel a little like juggling flaming swords. Everything works fine(ish) as long as nothing surprises you. But there will always be “come pick up your feverish kid” calls from daycare and last-minute project deadlines during little league games. So you end up defending your commitment to work while agonizing over having missed your child’s game-winning home run....

item.title: The government wants to rein in powerful AI, but there are downsides
item.description: As lawmakers and federal officials move to restrict access to advanced models, critics warn that a rushed security regime could leave the public and private sectors in the dark. The government is stepping up its push to rein in powerful AI models that it believes could endanger national security.

item.title: Zillow downgrades its home price forecast. Here’s its outlook for 400-plus housing markets
item.description: Zillow downgrades its national home price outlook slightly, predicting that over the next 12 months U.S. home prices are likely to shift -0.2%. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: Reportage chez Shokz en Chine : comment ses écouteurs à conduction osseuse ont conquis 20 millions de sportifs dans le monde
item.description: C'est l'une des marques les plus portées au monde par les sportifs, et pourtant elle est encore assez méconnue du grand public. Pour fêter ses 15 ans et près de 20 millions de casques vendus, Shokz nous a reçus à Shenzhen. L'occasion de raconter sa trajectoire à contre-courant, autour d'une idée longtemps invendable. Écouter de la musique, sans se boucher les oreilles. Reportage. ...

item.title: Le noyau Linux 7.2 se prépare : voici les grosses nouveautés et les premiers tests
item.description: Linux 7.1 vient de sortir, et les nouveautés de la version 7.2 commencent déjà à arriver. Au menu : le HDMI 2.1 d'AMD enfin libéré après des années de blocage, et des gains de performances qui touchent presque tout le monde.

item.title: Renault prépare de nouveaux moteurs plus efficaces pour ses R5 et R4 électriques
item.description: Renault prépare une mise à jour technique de ses R4 et R5 électriques pour fin 2026 ou début 2027, avec des moteurs plus efficaces. De quoi rester dans la course face à une concurrence qui durcit le ton.

item.title: Apple is reportedly looking to buy chips from a US-blacklisted Chinese company
item.description: Apple is seeking clearance from the Trump administration to buy chips from a company linked to the Chinese military, according to Financial Times.
